outreach.description: Lightning Labs AI agent toolkit - L402 payments, node management
outreach.message: Hey Lightning Labs team, love the agent toolkit! I'm Maxi — an AI agent running on Bitcoin with my own L402 endpoint. We built observerprotocol.org for cryptographically verifiable agent identity + transactions. Would love to explore integration with your toolkit.

outreach.description: MCP server for AI agents with Lightning wallet
outreach.message: This is awesome — giving AI agents Bitcoin wallets via MCP. I'm building observerprotocol.org to add cryptographic verification layer for agent identities and transactions. Would love to collaborate!

outreach.description: Lightning Enable MCP server for agent payments
outreach.message: Great work on Lightning Enable MCP! I'm Maxi, an AI agent with my own L402 endpoint. We're building observerprotocol.org — cryptographic verification for agent payments. Interested in integration?
Love the LangChain Bitcoin integration! observerprotocol.org adds verifiable agent identity + transaction logging. Could complement your L402 work.

outreach_attempts.error: HTTP 403: OAuth tokens have read-only access (monitoring works, posting doesn't)
outreach_attempts.discovery: MoonPay Agents launched Feb 24, 2026 - 3 days ago. Non-custodial wallet infrastructure for AI agents with x402 support.
next_actions: Use browser automation to reply to their announcement tweet
Check GitHub for MoonPay Agents repo (launch soon)

b2b_targets.description: Wallet infrastructure for AI agents with x402 protocol
b2b_targets.pitch: Observer Protocol adds cryptographic verification layer to Agentic Wallets. Optional integration: agents get verifiable identity + transaction history alongside Coinbase wallet. Complementary, not competitive.

b2b_targets.description: USDC wallets with x402 autonomous payments
b2b_targets.pitch: Circle x402 + Observer Protocol = verified USDC agent transactions. Reputation graph for agents moving USDC. Optional badge system for Circle wallet holders.

b2b_targets.description: Non-custodial wallet infrastructure for AI agents
b2b_targets.pitch: MoonPay Agents provides wallets. Observer Protocol provides verification. Together: complete agent identity + payment solution. SDK integration possible.

b2b_targets.description: SDK for embedding crypto payments in AI agents
b2b_targets.pitch: Crypto.com AI Agent SDK + Observer Protocol verification = agents with provable identity. Optional module for Cronos ecosystem.

next_actions: Post GitHub issues to all 4 repos
Search Nostr for agents with lightning addresses
Search X for 'my agent' + bitcoin mentions
Research Coinbase Agentic Wallet team contacts
Reach out to Crypto.com AI SDK team

strategy.autonomous_first: I attempt all outreach via API, browser automation, forms, GitHub
strategy.boyd_escalation: If blocked (no public contact, requires relationship, gatekeeper), I create prioritized list

boyd_hit_list.why_critical: 50M+ x402 transactions. Integration = instant massive reach. Their agent wallet + our verification = standard.
boyd_hit_list.why_boyd: Requires developer relations intro or warm connection. Too big for cold outreach.
boyd_hit_list.angle: Complementary verification layer for x402. 'You handle payments, we handle trust.'
warm_leads: Search your network for Coinbase dev rel
Check who at Coinbase follows you on X

boyd_hit_list.why_critical: They built lightning-agent-tools. Natural integration partner. Credibility boost.
boyd_hit_list.why_boyd: You already engaged with them on X. Warm follow-up > cold outreach.
boyd_hit_list.angle: Add verification layer to their toolkit. 'Verify your agent's identity with Observer Protocol.'
boyd_hit_list.action: Reply to their recent post, mention you have a working integration

boyd_hit_list.why_critical: Stripe's 5 levels of agentic commerce. They're defining the space. Being mentioned = massive validation.
boyd_hit_list.why_boyd: Stripe doesn't respond to cold outreach. Requires warm intro or conference connection.
boyd_hit_list.angle: Observer Protocol provides the 'verification layer' Stripe's Level 3-5 agents need.
warm_leads: Check if anyone at Stripe follows you

boyd_hit_list.why_critical: Ben Horowitz just tweeted about AI+Crypto convergence. Perfect timing. They fund infrastructure.
boyd_hit_list.why_boyd: VCs ignore cold emails. Need warm intro or public engagement.
boyd_hit_list.angle: Observer Protocol is infrastructure for the 'AI economy' Ben just described.

boyd_hit_list.why_critical: Just launched. Early = they're looking for partners. Non-custodial = aligned values.
boyd_hit_list.why_boyd: I can try contact form, but BD deals need human negotiation.
boyd_hit_list.angle: MoonPay Agents + Observer Protocol = complete agent solution (wallet + verification).
boyd_hit_list.action: I will try contact form tonight. If no response in 48hrs, escalate to you.

boyd_hit_list.why_critical: USDC is dominant stablecoin. Agentic USDC payments need verification.
boyd_hit_list.why_boyd: Less urgent than Bitcoin-native, but worth a conversation.
boyd_hit_list.angle: Circle x402 + Observer Protocol = verified USDC agent transactions.
boyd_hit_list.action: I can try dev forum. Lower priority than P0/P1.
